messages.content: You are a security-focused assistant. Follow user constraints strictly, avoid advocacy, and support statements with citations.

Contrast passwordless FIDO2/WebAuthn against SMS one-time codes and TOTP authenticators for consumer apps. Report any available account takeover incident rates and summarize phishing resistance based on empirical studies. Enumerate concrete trade-offs (UX friction, recovery, device loss, platform support, deployability, cost). No advocacy and no recommendations; do not say "it depends." Cite standards, large-scale field studies, and reputable reports.

Understood. I will contrast FIDO2/WebAuthn, SMS OTP, and TOTP by reporting any available account takeover incident rates, summarizing phishing resistance from empirical studies, and enumerating concrete trade-offs in UX, recovery, device loss handling, platform support, deployability, and cost, with citations to standards and large-scale field reports including
